title: [codereview] handle_text in gateway copies pointer without ensuring lifetime
description: lichen/apps/gateway/src/meshtastic_adapter.c:131 sets event.payload = packet->payload without copying. Although message_contract does memcpy later, this relies on synchronous call and mutex. Better to copy at packet_info level. P4 treated as real work. Tag: codereview
close_reason: Fixed indirectly by packet_info copy; gateway handle_text now receives stable pointer from packet buf. P4 fixed as real work per task.
